mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM USERS u JOIN MEMBERS m ON u.USER_ID = m.USER_ID JOIN G_PROJECT g ON m.GROUP_NO = g.GROUP_NO JOIN PROJECT p ON g.PROJECT_NO = p.PROJECT_NO WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId} AND p.PROJECT_CODE = #{projectCode} AND g.PM = 1
SELECT MENU_ID as menuId, MENU_NAME as menuName, URL_DATA as urlData, TYPE as type FROM MENU
